pass_message: Propellant mass is within the Class 1 limit.
fail_message: Propellant mass exceeds the Class 1 limit.
missing_message: Propellant mass is required to determine Class 1 status.

pass_message: The propellant is identified as slow-burning.
fail_message: The propellant is not identified as slow-burning.
missing_message: Propellant burn type is required to determine Class 1 status.

pass_message: The reported rocket materials are consistent with the Class 1 material requirement.
fail_message: One or more reported materials may not satisfy the Class 1 material requirement.
missing_message: Rocket materials are required to determine Class 1 status.

pass_message: The rocket does not contain substantial metal parts.
fail_message: The rocket contains substantial metal parts and does not meet this Class 1 condition.
missing_message: Metal-part information is required to determine Class 1 status.

pass_message: Total liftoff mass is within the Class 1 limit.
fail_message: Total liftoff mass exceeds the Class 1 limit.
missing_message: Total liftoff mass is required to determine Class 1 status.

fail_message: The planned flight is not suborbital.

missing_message: The system must confirm that the rocket is unmanned.

pass_message: No identified hazard to persons, property, or aircraft was reported.
fail_message: The proposed operation creates an identified hazard.
missing_message: A human safety review is required to determine whether the operation creates a hazard.

pass_message: Cloud coverage does not exceed five-tenths.
missing_message: Cloud coverage information is required for Class 2 and Class 3 operations.

pass_message: Horizontal visibility is at least five miles.
fail_message: Horizontal visibility is less than five miles.
missing_message: Visibility information is required for Class 2 and Class 3 operations.

pass_message: The rocket will not be launched into a cloud.
fail_message: Launching into a cloud is prohibited for Class 2 and Class 3 rockets.

pass_message: FAA authorization is reported for the nighttime launch.
fail_message: FAA authorization is required for a nighttime Class 2 or Class 3 launch.
missing_message: Authorization status is required for a nighttime launch.

pass_message: The launch is at least five nautical miles from an airport boundary or FAA authorization is reported.
fail_message: FAA authorization is required within five nautical miles of an airport boundary.
missing_message: Airport distance and authorization status are required.

pass_message: FAA authorization is reported for controlled airspace.
fail_message: FAA authorization is required for operation in controlled airspace.
missing_message: Controlled-airspace and authorization status must be confirmed.

pass_message: The reported separation distance meets the calculated FAA minimum.
fail_message: The reported separation distance is below the calculated FAA minimum.
missing_message: Expected altitude and separation distance are required.

pass_message: A responsible adult at least 18 years old is reported as present.
fail_message: A responsible adult at least 18 years old is required.

pass_message: Reasonable fire-reporting and control precautions are reported.
fail_message: Reasonable fire-reporting and control precautions are required.

pass_message: ATC notification is reported within the required 24-to-72-hour window.
fail_message: ATC notification was not completed within the required window.
missing_message: ATC notification information is required for rockets other than Class 1.

pass_message: Required waiver information was reportedly submitted at least 45 days before the operation.
fail_message: Required waiver information must be submitted at least 45 days before the proposed operation.
missing_message: Submission timing is required when a waiver or authorization is required.
